title: 雙人皮划艇漫遊
lyrics_text:
[verse]
在微風中輕飄，雙人皮划艇上。
水波拍打着船身，偶爾泛起笑聲。
親切的目光相對，心隨風兒輕舞。
[chorus]
隨著節奏輕柔搖擺，心中的樂章不離手。
忘卻煩悶，在這片水域遨遊。
每一刻都值得珍惜，與你共度時光。
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 5.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 9.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
